series_metadata.series_description: Safety inspection reports completed by all Mine Safety Inspectors for all types of mining sites,underground,above,etc. This includes inspections for new mining areas,roof control,all aspects of a mine that could have a safety factor. Safety being for people of land or future building sites. These are historical records that might be needed in an emergency situation.
